finish_hotkey_description: Global shortcut to finish the current race without opening the app. Works while you're in your game.
sound_description: Volume of in-app sounds (countdown, lobby, race results).
stream_description: Capture framerate and bitrate for your live stream.
replay_description: Ranked races are saved to your computer as an MP4 you can upload later.
replay_autodelete_label: Automatically delete replays after one week
replay_delete_uploaded_label: Delete the local replay once its upload is verified
